result.summary: Found 3 issues: navigation text truncation, carousel overflow with partial card visibility, and responsive layout problems affecting content display.

issues.description: Navigation tab text 'Hot Gam' is truncated, should display as 'Hot Games'
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab width or use text truncation with ellipsis (...) to properly display the full text, or reduce font size if space is constrained

issues.description: Game carousel items overflow their containers, showing partial/cut-off game cards on the right edge of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections
issues.suggestion: Ensure carousel items are properly constrained within the viewport, adjust card width/margin, or implement proper horizontal scrolling with visible carousel controls

issues.description: Game titles in exclusive games section appear truncated (e.g., 'MAGNI', 'PHON') and are not fully visible within their card containers
issues.suggestion: Increase card width, reduce font size, implement text truncation with ellipsis, or use a multi-line title layout to ensure full game names are readable
